description: Capabilities granted to the main window — explicit allowlist of every Tauri command (TASK-028). New commands MUST be added here to be invokable from the renderer; Tauri 2 fails closed. Sec-review H2 (Phase 4 wave 3) added the scoped plugin permissions for the Tauri Updater, Autostart, and Process plugins so the renderer can drive Settings → Updates + Tray menu without an over-broad `*:default` grant. Sec-review M2 (Phase 4 wave 6) dropped `core:tray:*` — the tray icon is built entirely in the Rust setup() hook and the renderer drives its state through the typed `tray_set_*` shell commands, never through `plugin:core:tray|*` directly.
